mods.name: Anti-Barrier Hand Cannon
mods.desc: Your equipped Hand Cannons fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

mods.name: Anti-Barrier Sniper Rifle
mods.desc: Your equipped Sniper Rifles fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

mods.name: Overload Pulse Rifle
mods.desc:
Your equipped Pulse Rifles fire disrupting rounds which stun the target, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

mods.name: Overload Submachine Gun
mods.desc:
Your equipped Submachine Guns fire disrupting rounds which stun the target, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output.

Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

mods.name: Unstoppable Bow
mods.desc: Crossbows, and Bows that have been fully drawn for a short time, fire a powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

mods.name: Stunning Fusion
mods.desc:
Aiming down the sights of a Fusion Rifle or Linear Fusion Rifle for a short time loads a powerful payload that stuns unshielded combatants. 

Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

mods.name: Shield-Shattering Rounds
mods.desc: Your Machine Guns fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

mods.name: Impact, Shock, Gravity
mods.desc:
Grants access to the Helmet mods: Kinetic/Void Siphon and Kinetic/Arc Siphon.

These mods combine two elemental siphons at a discounted cost.

mods.name: Gravitic-Voltaic Charge
mods.desc: While you have an Arc or Void Super equipped, increase the maximum number of stacks of Armor Charge you can carry by 1.

mods.name: Expert Handling
mods.desc: Weapon final blows grant a stacking bonus to stability which resets on weapon reload or stow. Swords gain Guard Resistance.

mods.name: Fastest Draw
mods.desc: If the first shot shortly after reloading or readying your weapon is a precision hit, gain flinch resistance.

mods.name: Elemental Siphon
mods.desc: Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super.

mods.name: Concentrated Forward Firepower
mods.desc: Sustained damage from Fusion Rifles, Linear Fusion Rifles, and Machine Guns grants those weapons bonus stability, range, and aim assist for a short time.

mods.name: Vanguard Surplus Discounts
mods.desc: All Ammo Finder mods are discounted.

mods.name: Press The Advantage
mods.desc: Breaking a combatant's shield grants increased weapon stability, handling, and reload speed. Swords gain increased guard resistance.

mods.name: Kinetic Synthesis
mods.desc: Sustained Kinetic weapon damage and rapid final blows have a chance to generate a unique ammo brick. Collecting this brick will grant ammo to equipped Kinetic damage weapons and grant Special and Heavy ammo progress.

mods.name: Reload at Range
mods.desc: Precision hits with Bows and Sniper Rifles grant a stacking bonus to their reload speed.

mods.name: Riposte
mods.desc: Shortly after guarding with a Sword, your light and heavy attacks stun unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

mods.name: Power from Pain
mods.desc: Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grant you Devour.

mods.name: Fierce Proxemics
mods.desc: Finisher final blows grant grenade and melee energy.

mods.name: Rapid Remedy
mods.desc: Machine Gun rapid final blows heal you.

mods.name: Dielectric
mods.desc:
Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small portion of health.

mods.name: Armorsmith
mods.desc: Breaking a combatant's shield temporarily grants you damage resistance and increased melee damage.

mods.name: Counter Energy
mods.desc: When you or a member of your fireteam stuns a champion, you gain energy for your least-charged ability.

mods.name: Combination Argent Blade
mods.desc: Briefly pause after executing a light attack, then follow it up with a light or heavy attack to empower your Sword for a short time, granting it bonus damage and charge rate.

mods.name: Singularity Blade
mods.desc: While you have a Void elemental buff, melee and Sword hits weaken targets, while melee and Sword final blows create a weakening burst.

mods.name: Blinding Jolts
mods.desc: Final blows on jolted combatants blind nearby combatants.

mods.name: Precision Equity
mods.desc: Precision final blows build progress towards a large Orb of Power that also grants bonus weapon damage on pickup. Higher ranked targets grant more progress.

mods.name: Elemental Orbs: Arc
mods.desc: [Arc]Arc weapon final blows have a chance to spawn an Arc Elemental Orb. Arc Orbs can be thrown or shot to create an Arc explosion that jolts targets it damages.

mods.name: Kinetic Rupture
mods.desc: Kinetic weapon damage against a powerful combatant has a chance to create a Kinetic Rupture. Targeting this Rupture causes a damaging explosion that staggers combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

mods.name: Sniper's Meditation
mods.desc: Sniper Rifle hits grant stacking Sniper Rifle damage, stability, and reload bonuses for a short time. Heavy ammo Sniper Rifle hits count as more than one hit.

mods.name: Sword Storm Combo
mods.desc: Performing three Sword light attacks followed by a heavy attack summons penumbral blades that surround you to damage and disorient combatants. Sword final blows extend the duration of these penumbral blades.

mods.name: Void Infestation
mods.desc: Defeating a weakened target spawns a tracking projectile that weakens other targets.

mods.name: Tazer Tag
mods.desc: Arc-powered melee hits jolt combatants and deal further damage for a short duration.

mods.name: Sticker Shock
mods.desc: Arc Flux, Magnetic, and Fusion Grenades deal more damage when attached to combatants; on final blows, they release several micro-missiles that seek nearby combatants.
